name: GH_GDI_Util
summary: Contains some global function for filleting corners of GDI objects.

methods.name: BoxUnion
methods.summary: Create the outline of a set of boxes.

returns.doc: A list of Point arrays, where each array describes the corners of each silhouette.

methods.name: FilletBoxOutline
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath FilletBoxOutline(IEnumerable<Rectangle> boxes, int radius)
methods.summary: Fillet all the corners of the combined outline of a set of rectangles.

returns.doc: GraphicsPath describing the filleted outline or null on failure.

methods.name: FilletPolyline(Point[], Int32)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath FilletPolyline(Point[] corners, int radius)
methods.summary: Fillet all the corners of a freeform outline.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Fillet to apply to all corners.

returns.doc: A graphics path describing the filleted shape, or Nothing on failure.

methods.name: FilletPolyline(PointF[], Single)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath FilletPolyline(PointF[] corners, float radius)
methods.summary: Fillet all the corners of a freeform outline.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Fillet to apply to all corners.

returns.doc: A graphics path describing the filleted shape, or Nothing on failure.

methods.name: FilletRectangle
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath FilletRectangle(Rectangle box, int radius)
methods.summary: Create a rectangle with filleted corners.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Fillet radius, radius will be limited if too large.

methods.name: Freeform_Blob(IEnumerable<RectangleF>, Int32, Double)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath Freeform_Blob(IEnumerable<RectangleF> content, int padding, double accuracy)
methods.summary: Create a meta-ball outline for a set of rectangles.

params.name: padding
params.doc: Number of units to add to each box.

params.name: accuracy
params.doc: Pixel accuracy for isosurface outlines. 3 is a good value for 1:1 UI.

returns.doc: A graphics path describing all iso-surfaces.

methods.name: Freeform_Blob(IEnumerable<RectangleF>, Int32, Double, FieldSolver, Double)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath Freeform_Blob(IEnumerable<RectangleF> content, int padding, double accuracy, FieldSolver solver, double section)
methods.summary: Create a meta-ball outline for a set of rectangles.

params.name: padding
params.doc: Number of units to add to each box.

params.name: accuracy
params.doc: Pixel accuracy for isosurface outlines. 3 is a good value for 1:1 UI.

params.name: solver
params.doc: The falloff solver to use. GH_Util.MetaBall.GH_Context contains a bunch of predefined solvers.

returns.doc: A graphics path describing all iso-surfaces

methods.name: SimplifyBoxes
methods.summary: Create a simplified collection of Rectangles that describe the same union space as the supplied rectangles.

returns.doc: An ordered collection of non-intersecting rectangles or null on failure.
